title: 1 Ducat - Frederik III

obverse.description: Laureate bust of King Frederik III facing right, wearing armour with pteruges and mantle with shoulder clasp.
obverse.lettering: · FRID · III · D · G · DAN · NOR · V · G · REX ·
obverse.unabridged_legend: Fridericus III, Dei gratia, Daniae, Norvegiae, Vandalorumque, Gothoruque rex.
obverse.lettering_translation: Frederick III, by the grace of God, King of Denmark, Norway, the Wends, and the Goths.

reverse.description: Crowned coat of arms of King Frederick III on square shield.
reverse.lettering:
DVX · SL · HO · STO DIT · CO · OL · DEL
1668
G  K
reverse.unabridged_legend: Dux Slesvici, Holsatiae, Stormariae [et] Dithmarsiae, Comes Oldenburgii [et] Delmenhorstii.
reverse.lettering_translation: Duke of Schleswig, Holstein, Stormarn, and Dithmarschen, Count of Oldenburg and Delmenhorst.

comments:
Mint master: Gotfred Krüger.

The two dates may have some small differences in portrait and shape/size of arms and crown.
Check it here: http://www.danskmoent.dk/fr/f3h35.htm
